description_long: This is a two-story urban house with a white stucco exterior and a prominent, overhanging metal roof. The front facade features a large double wooden door flanked by a single decorative column and a small security camera above the entryway. There are two upper windows with ornate wrought iron grilles and a side window protected by a metal security grate. The base of the house is finished with stone or concrete, and the sidewalk in front is tiled. The roof is a simple hip style with visible seams and a slight overhang for rain protection. The overall appearance suggests a blend of traditional and utilitarian urban architecture.
description: A two-story white stucco house with a hip metal roof, ornate upper windows, and a large wooden entry door framed by a column.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main double door, decorative column, two upper windows with iron grilles, and tiled sidewalk.
description_view_1: Side angle revealing the metal roof overhang, side window with security grate, and partial view of the front entry.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the plain, unadorned wall and the geometric pattern of the metal roof.
description_view_3: Oblique view highlighting the side window, front entry, and the intersection of the roof and walls.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with decorative iron grilles
attribute_entryway_design: Large double wooden door with a single decorative column, tiled step, and small overhang
